text.title: MCP Basics: Model Context Protocol Server Development Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does a public MCP server cover this integration?

conclusion.verdict: use the public server; do not duplicate
scaffold via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk + zod; stdio transport; one tool first
scaffold via mcp-server-python + pydantic; stdio transport; one tool first

text.example: public_exists=false → q-language: TS → scaffold with @modelcontextprotocol/sdk + zod; one tool `get_forecast`; inspector pass; published to npm.
